songs.title: Mr. Brightside
feed: “Mr. Brightside” by The Killers spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 84 sales units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 205 streams units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 519,162 total units.
